meaning: 芒格洛尔[印度西南部港市]
examples: Her ancestors are from the Bunt community of Mangalore.
Boeing 737 flew from Dubai to Mangalore in southern India.
Deepika Padukone: "Just heard about the plane crash in Mangalore... shocking!"
Bains qualified as a doctor from Mangalore University in 1993 and became a GP in 2007.
This morning Mrs Saldanha's body arrived in the city of Mangalore, India, for burial.
